-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.mixpanel.com/docs/features/mcp)[Privacy Policy](https://mixpanel.com/legal/privacy-policy/)[Support](https://mixpanel.com/contact-us/support/)
    

Query and analyze your Mixpanel data directly in Claude. Run segmentation, funnel, and retention analyses, explore your event taxonomy, manage Lexicon metadata, analyze session replays, and resolve data quality issues. With Mixpanel as persistent context, Claude can reason about your product data alongside your code, documents, and decisions, across any conversation.

You can use Mixpanel to:

**Create Dashboards:**  
"Can you create a dashboard of customer purchase behaviors?"

**Quick Analysis:**  
"How many sign ups did we have in January?"

**Govern Your Data:**  
"Can you update my Lexicon event descriptions?"

**Event Analysis:**  
"Show me the conversion funnel for our checkout process"
